title: cleisostoma fissicors
intro: Cleisostoma fissicors, a type of orchid plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where its roots are believed to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleisostoma fissicors are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cleisostoma fissicors typically involve boiling the roots in water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
